page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package to detect selection in biological pathways. Using gene selection scores and biological pathways data, one can search for high-scoring subnetworks of genes within pathways and test their significance.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package to detect selection in biological pathways. Using gene selection scores and biological pathways data, one can search for high-scoring subnetworks of genes within pathways and test their significance.
